biography: Kristian, a familiar face from Master Golf Club, brings his competitive spirit to the greens of the Hector Trophée once more. Known for his meticulous approach and unwavering focus, Kristian's presence is always felt by his fellow competitors.

While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Kristian's dedication to the sport and his strategic prowess make him a formidable contender. He has participated in the Hector Trophée three times in the past and is now gearing up for his fourth appearance in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026.

Beyond the course, Kristian is known for his thoughtful demeanor and sportsmanship, and is very well liked by everyone at Master Golf Club. An avid reader of golfing history, Kristian is looking to carve out his own legacy at the Hector Trophée.
